heat_treatment_text: 3h at 1163 °C and 100 Mpa --> 954 °C followed by quenching, then dual-temperature precipitation ageing at 718 °C for 8 h, followed by furnace cooling to 621 °C and holding until a combined ageing time of 18 h was achieved.
1 h at 980C + air cool--> 8 h at 720C + furnace cool to 620C --> 8 h at 620C+Air-cooled to room temperature

2 h of hot isostatic pressure at 1200C and 150 MPa + slow cool in HIP device --> 8 h at 720C + furnace cool to
620C --> 8 h at 620C+Air-cooled to room temperature
2 h at 1200C --> 8 h at 720C + furnace cool to 620C --> 8 h at 620C+Air-cooled to room temperature

980 °C for 1 h, followed by air cool (cooling rate of 100 °C/min approx.)--> Aging heat treatment at 720 °C for 8 h, furnace cool to 620 °C in 2 h, hold at 620 °C for 8 h, followed by air cool (cooling rate of 100 °C/min approx.)

980 °C for 4 h at 100 MPa followed by rapid cooling at approx. 42 °C/min. Solution heat treatment at 980 °C for 1 h, followed by air cool (cooling rate of 100 °C/min approx.)--> Aging heat treatment at 720 °C for 8 h, furnace cool to 620 °C in 2 h, hold at 620 °C for 8 h, followed by air cool (cooling rate of 100 °C/min approx.)
